basic_details.job_title: DCPU Katihar Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Katihar (DCPU Katihar)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Katihar (DCPU Katihar) Support Person Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DCPU Katihar. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Katihar Support Person Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in MSW/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law, Graduation with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling with 3 years experience
qualification.details: Post Graduation in MSW/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law OR Graduation with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling with 3 years experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://katihar.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Katihar Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Katihar Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_child_protection_unit_katihar_d: Post Graduation in MSW/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law, Graduation with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling with 3 years experience

content_sections.heading: DCPU Katihar Support Person Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Katihar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Katihar Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Katihar Support Person Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduation in MSW/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law OR Graduation with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling with 3 years experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years

content_sections.heading: DCPU Katihar Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://katihar.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Katihar Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Katihar Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Katihar Support Person recruitment is 02-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Support Person position by the District Child Protection Unit Katihar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduation in MSW/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law, or Graduation with a Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling along with 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Support Person post is between 30 years to 65 years. Specific age relaxations might apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Support Person post will receive a salary of Rs. 9000 per case.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DCPU Katihar Support Person recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification and an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Katihar, which is https://katihar.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Katihar Support Person recruitment?
